message:
test: pin eventfd+timerfd+signalfd conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_event_timer_fd.rs covering 7 functions:
- eventfd: 6 flag combos, write+read round-trip 12345, initval=7
  first-read, eventfd_read / eventfd_write helpers
- timerfd_create: 4 flag combos
- timerfd_settime/timerfd_gettime: 1s one-shot, it_value sanity range
- signalfd: creation with empty mask + CLOEXEC

7 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-etf1
